description: Intentional divergences from the baseline template. CTRL-004 checks this before deploying any hook or setting, and deploys a snapshot to each repo's controller-note/exclusions.json. Any agent or audit hook modifying settings.json MUST check this file first.

entries.reason: Causes excessive workflow noise on Ether; session_guard reports false positives
Intentionally removed 2026-05-20; Leviathan is a memory store, not a workflow executor
Intentionally removed 2026-05-20; replaced by post_action_notify.py which has dedup logic
